claim: Gemini 2.5 has native YouTube video understanding: pass a URL directly and ask questions about the video content without manual transcription
actionable: When building multi-modal research workflows, use Gemini 2.5's native YouTube integration instead of downloading and parsing videos separately.
source_title: Building a multi-modal researcher with Gemini 2.5

claim: Gemini 2.5 multi-speaker text-to-speech can generate synthetic podcasts from research; parameterize speaker names and voices for customization
actionable: Extend research tools to audio output by using Gemini's TTS API with configured speaker personas instead of manual narration.
source_title: Building a multi-modal researcher with Gemini 2.5

claim: Gemini 2.5 native Google Search tool integrates directly into model calls; pass search as a tool in the tools parameter, no API wrapper needed
actionable: Use native search tools in Gemini API instead of building custom search integrations; it's simpler and handles parsing automatically.
source_title: Building a multi-modal researcher with Gemini 2.5

claim: Gemini 2.5 achieves state-of-the-art on multiple benchmarks; people prefer it to other models in community vibe tests like Pelican SVG drawing
actionable: For multi-modal tasks (vision, reasoning, coding), test Gemini 2.5 first; community reception and benchmarks favor it.
source_title: Building a multi-modal researcher with Gemini 2.5
